name: Barium sulfate
description: Barium sulfate is an inorganic compound with the chemical formula BaSO4. It displays low solubility in water, and is used in various chemical and industrial applications. It is a common contrast agent for diagonistic purposes and X-ray imaging; it is indicated radiographic examination of the gastrointestinal tract. Unlike other contrasting compounds derived from lighter nuclei, barium sulfate absorb X-rays stronger. Other therapeutic advantages of barium sulfate in diagnostic procedures include its low solubility and effective removal from the body. It is added in food contact substances as an indirect additive
